// comments for exports.require: CJS bundle is kept until all consumers are ESM-ready (Req 1.3); apps/app dev runs on ts-node 10, whose vendored CJS loader rejects require(esm) even on Node 24. Remove after the dev runner is replaced (esm-migration Phase 3.7).

scripts.dev: pnpm gen:client-code && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node scripts/write-cjs-type.ts
scripts.build: pnpm gen:client-code && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node scripts/write-cjs-type.ts
